genres.name: Romance

people.name: Park Seo-joon
people.bio: Park Seo-joon is a South Korean actor known for his leading roles in romance and comedy dramas, as well as high-profile film projects.

people.name: IU (Lee Ji-eun)
people.bio: IU is a Korean singer-songwriter and actress, acclaimed for her music career and starring roles in fantasy and slice-of-life dramas.

people.name: Park Bo-gum
people.bio: Park Bo-gum is a South Korean actor recognized for his versatile performances in romance, youth, and historical dramas.

people.name: Hyun Bin
people.bio: Hyun Bin is a veteran Korean actor famed for his roles in hit romance and action dramas, including global sensations.

people.name: Son Ye-jin
people.bio: Son Ye-jin is a South Korean actress celebrated for her nuanced performances in melodrama, romance, and film.

people.name: Gong Yoo
people.bio: Gong Yoo is a prominent Korean actor known for fantasy and thriller projects on both television and film.

people.name: Kim Go-eun
people.bio: Kim Go-eun is a Korean actress noted for her roles in fantasy, romance, and coming-of-age dramas.

people.name: Lee Jong-suk
people.bio: Lee Jong-suk is an actor popular for legal, fantasy, and romantic dramas with strong fandom appeal.

people.name: Kim Ji-won
people.bio: Kim Ji-won is a South Korean actress known for scene-stealing roles in romance and ensemble dramas.

people.name: Seo Yea-ji
people.bio: Seo Yea-ji is known for intense performances in thriller and psychological romance dramas.

people.name: Choi Woo-shik
people.bio: Choi Woo-shik is an actor active in both films and dramas, often appearing in coming-of-age and thriller projects.

people.name: Lee Eun-woo
people.bio: Lee Eun-woo is a rising actor frequently cast in 2023–2024 romantic comedy dramas.

people.name: Han Soe-ri
people.bio: Han Soe-ri is an actress appearing in light-hearted campus romances and web dramas.

people.name: Jung Min-ho
people.bio: Jung Min-ho is a television director specializing in thriller and mystery dramas with tight pacing.

people.name: Park So-young
people.bio: Park So-young is a screenwriter known for heartfelt romantic comedies with strong ensemble casts.

people.name: Punch
people.bio: Punch is a Korean vocalist famed for drama OSTs, particularly in fantasy and romance series.

people.name: Ailee
people.bio: Ailee is a powerhouse vocalist well-known for contributing emotional ballads to Korean drama soundtracks.

articles.title: Park Seo-joon In Talks for Lead Role in New 2026 Romance Drama
articles.body:
Park Seo-joon is reportedly in final talks to star in upcoming romance drama "Midnight Romance in Namsan" (working title). According to industry insiders, the series will follow a top actor who hides out in a quiet neighborhood and the scriptwriter who becomes his unexpected neighbor.

The production team is aiming for a late 2026 premiere, with filming to begin in early summer. If confirmed, this would mark Park Seo-joon’s first small-screen romance project in several years. Fans are already speculating about potential co-stars and the creative team behind the project.

The agency stated that the offer is one of the projects under review, and nothing has been decided yet.

articles.title: Park Seo-joon to Guest on Hit Variety Show Next Week
articles.body:
Park Seo-joon has been confirmed as a special guest on next week’s episode of popular variety program "Weekend Playground." The actor reportedly spent a full day filming various outdoor challenges and a candid interview segment.

Producers teased that Park Seo-joon shared behind-the-scenes stories from recent dramas and talked about his approach to choosing new projects. Fans can also look forward to a surprise appearance from one of his longtime co-stars during the episode.

The broadcast is scheduled to air on Sunday in the prime time slot.

articles.title: Park Seo-joon Attends Launch Event for City Lights 2022 Director's Cut
articles.body:
Park Seo-joon made a surprise appearance at the launch event for the director’s cut of 2022 romance drama "City Lights 2022." Dressed in a tailored navy suit, the actor posed with the cast and crew and greeted fans who gathered at the Seoul event space.

During a brief talk session, Park Seo-joon reflected on filming the drama’s most memorable scenes and thanked viewers for embracing the series long after its original broadcast. The event also featured a mini screening of newly edited scenes and a live performance of one of the drama’s OST tracks.

Photos from the event quickly trended on social media, with fans praising his effortless red carpet visuals.

articles.title: Punch Releases New OST Single for Starlight Chronicles
articles.body:
Vocalist Punch has dropped a new digital single for fantasy drama "Starlight Chronicles." The track, titled "Eternal Glow," serves as a theme for the drama’s main couple and is featured prominently in the final episodes.

The song blends orchestral strings with Punch’s signature emotional vocals, matching the show’s sweeping fantasy visuals. A special lyric video featuring key moments from the drama was released simultaneously on the official channel.

Fans have praised the OST for amplifying the romance and otherworldly atmosphere of the series.

articles.title: Ailee Joins Campus Heartbeats OST Lineup With Powerful Ballad
articles.body:
Ailee has officially joined the OST lineup for 2024 romantic comedy "Campus Heartbeats" with a new ballad that plays during a pivotal confession scene. The track showcases her powerhouse vocals over a modern rock arrangement.

According to the production team, the song was recorded earlier this year and carefully timed to coincide with the drama’s recent ratings surge. A behind-the-scenes video from the recording studio will be released later this week.

Viewers have already begun sharing clips of the scene featuring the song, praising how well it matches the emotions of the characters.

articles.title: Midweek Mystery 2024 Unveils Haunting New Main Theme
articles.body:
Thriller drama "Midweek Mystery 2024" has released a new main theme track that will underscore the second half of the season. Composed with tense strings and atmospheric synths, the piece builds suspense during key investigation sequences.

Producers revealed that the track was created after early episodes aired, inspired by viewer reactions to the show’s most intense cliffhangers. An extended version of the theme is now available on major streaming platforms.

Fans have described the new music as "chilling" and "perfect for late-night viewing."

articles.title: Crash Landing on You Episode 1 Recap: A Sudden Storm
articles.body:
Episode 1 of "Crash Landing on You" introduces chaebol heiress Yoon Se-ri as she prepares to launch her own brand. A sudden paragliding accident sweeps her over the border into North Korea, where she literally crashes into the life of stoic officer Ri Jeong-hyeok.

The episode balances sharp humor with tension as Se-ri tries to understand her surroundings and Ri Jeong-hyeok debates whether to report her presence. Supporting characters on both sides of the border are briefly introduced, setting up future conflicts.

Key moments include Se-ri’s bewildered reaction to the North Korean village and the final cliffhanger, where Ri Jeong-hyeok decides to hide her rather than turn her in.

articles.title: Crash Landing on You Episode 2 Recap: Hiding in Plain Sight
articles.body:
Episode 2 finds Se-ri trying to blend into Ri Jeong-hyeok’s village as he claims she is a distant relative. The neighborhood ajummas grow suspicious as Se-ri’s modern habits clash with local norms.

Meanwhile, officers higher up the chain begin to sense that something unusual is happening in Ri Jeong-hyeok’s patrol area. The drama deepens the budding connection between Se-ri and Ri Jeong-hyeok through quiet conversations and small acts of kindness.

The episode ends with an unexpected inspection visit that threatens to expose Se-ri’s identity, heightening the stakes for everyone involved.

articles.title: Crash Landing on You Episode 3 Recap: Close Calls and Quiet Hearts
articles.body:
In Episode 3, Se-ri and Ri Jeong-hyeok face a series of close calls as officers intensify their search for a mysterious intruder. Se-ri’s attempts to help around the village lead to both comedic mishaps and heartfelt bonding.

The drama begins to hint at Ri Jeong-hyeok’s tragic past, while Se-ri reveals more about her complicated family situation back in South Korea. Their shared late-night conversations bring them emotionally closer, even as danger looms.

The episode concludes with a tense sequence at the village market, where a small mistake nearly exposes Se-ri in front of suspicious authorities.

articles.title: Shadow Chaser Renewed for Season 2 After Strong Ratings
articles.body:
Thriller drama "Shadow Chaser" has officially been renewed for a second season following its successful finale. The series drew praise for its tightly written twists and chilling performances.

Lead actors Seo Yea-ji and Choi Woo-shik are currently in discussions to reprise their roles, while director Jung Min-ho is expected to return to helm the new episodes. Season 2 will reportedly explore a fresh case that connects back to unresolved mysteries from the first season.

Production is aiming for a late 2026 broadcast, with casting confirmations to be announced in the coming months.

articles.title: Midweek Mystery 2024 Director Talks Building Tension Every Episode
articles.body:
Director Jung Min-ho sat down for an in-depth interview about crafting the atmosphere of "Midweek Mystery 2024." He explained how the team designed each episode to end on a memorable Wednesday-night cliffhanger that would keep viewers talking all week.

Jung shared insights into collaborating with the cast, the process of refining scripts, and the challenges of staging complex crime scenes on a tight shooting schedule. He also teased that the later episodes will venture into more psychological territory, blurring the line between reality and paranoia.

The interview sheds light on how careful sound design and lighting choices contribute to the drama’s unsettling tone.

articles.title: Weekend Watchlist: 2023–2024 Romantic Comedies With 30–45 Minute Episodes
articles.body:
Looking for light-hearted dramas to binge over the weekend? We’ve rounded up standout romantic comedies from 2023–2024 with breezy 30–45 minute episodes.

"Love in Bloom 2023" charms with its campus setting and opposites-attract leads, while "Campus Heartbeats" offers an ensemble of friends whose relationships evolve in funny and heartfelt ways. Both series keep episodes under 45 minutes, making them easy to marathon.

The article breaks down key strengths of each drama, including chemistry, pacing, and standout OST tracks, to help you decide which one to start first.

articles.title: Starlight Chronicles Finale Recap: Choosing Between Two Worlds
articles.body:
Episode 16 of "Starlight Chronicles" brings the fantasy romance to an emotional conclusion as the heroine must choose between returning to the human world or remaining in the starlit realm. The episode ties together the drama’s prophecies and character arcs while delivering several heartfelt goodbyes.

Major revelations about the true nature of the guardian spirits reframe earlier episodes, and the main couple’s final decision emphasizes personal growth over fate. The closing montage shows how both worlds are changed by their choices.

The recap breaks down key scenes, hidden details, and fan reactions to the long-awaited finale.

articles.title: Goblin Cast Reunites for 10th Anniversary Interview Special
articles.body:
The cast of beloved fantasy drama "Goblin" reunited for a 10th anniversary interview special, sharing memories from set and reflecting on the show’s lasting legacy. Gong Yoo and Kim Go-eun spoke about how the drama changed their careers and what scenes they still think about years later.

The special also features behind-the-scenes footage and commentary on fan-favorite moments, including the iconic rain and subway scenes. The full interview video is now available in the drama’s official video section.

Fans worldwide celebrated the reunion, trending related hashtags and posting side-by-side comparisons of then-and-now photos.

articles.title: Park Seo-joon Wins Top Excellence Award for City Lights 2022
articles.body:
Park Seo-joon took home the Top Excellence Award in a mini-series category for his performance in "City Lights 2022" at this year’s year-end drama awards. The actor thanked viewers, co-stars, and the production staff during his acceptance speech.

He also reflected on the emotional weight of the role and expressed his desire to explore more diverse characters in future projects. The cast of "City Lights 2022" later gathered backstage for celebratory photos that quickly spread online.

Critics widely agreed that the award was well-deserved, citing Park Seo-joon’s nuanced portrayal and strong chemistry with the ensemble cast.

articles.title: Goblin OST to Be Reissued on Vinyl for Anniversary
articles.body:
In celebration of its milestone anniversary, the OST for "Goblin" will be reissued as a limited-edition vinyl set. The release will include remastered versions of the drama’s most iconic tracks along with new artwork and a booklet containing production notes.

Fans can look forward to classic songs that helped define the drama’s emotional tone, now pressed on high-quality vinyl for collectors. Pre-orders open next week through official retailers.

The announcement has sparked excitement among longtime fans who credit the OST as one of the reasons the drama remains so beloved.

episodes.title: A Sudden Landing
episodes.synopsis: Heiress Yoon Se-ri is swept into North Korean territory during a paragliding accident and encounters officer Ri Jeong-hyeok.

episodes.title: Hiding in the Village
episodes.synopsis: Se-ri hides in Ri Jeong-hyeoks village home as he claims she is a visiting relative, raising the suspicions of his neighbors.

episodes.title: Close Calls
episodes.synopsis: A series of inspections and accidents nearly expose Se-ris identity as she and Ri Jeong-hyeok grow closer.

episodes.title: New Semester, New Neighbor
episodes.synopsis: A perfectionist top student is forced to share a cramped campus studio with a carefree musician.

episodes.title: Roommate Rules
episodes.synopsis: The pair draft strict rules for living together, only to break every single one within a day.

episodes.title: Orientation Day
episodes.synopsis: A group of freshmen with wildly different goals collide during university orientation.

episodes.title: Club Fair Chaos
episodes.synopsis: Romantic misunderstandings spark when everyone scrambles to join the most popular campus clubs.

episodes.title: A Chance Encounter in the Rain
episodes.synopsis: An exhausted architect meets a mysterious stranger during a late-night downpour in Seoul.

episodes.title: The Falling Star
episodes.synopsis: A struggling web novelist witnesses a star fall to earth and discovers a portal to a parallel realm.

episodes.title: Choosing Between Two Worlds
episodes.synopsis: The heroine must decide whether to remain in the starlit realm or return to the human world, changing both futures forever.

episodes.title: The Wednesday Caller
episodes.synopsis: A detective receives an anonymous call about a future crime that will always occur on a Wednesday night.

episodes.title: Threads Converge
episodes.synopsis: Clues from previous cases collide as the team realizes the Wednesday crimes are orchestrated by a single mastermind.

episodes.title: Echoes in the Dark
episodes.synopsis: A profiler returns to the force to hunt a killer whose crimes mirror an old unsolved case.

episodes.title: Rainy Day Confession
episodes.synopsis: Two longtime friends finally confront their feelings after getting stranded together in a sudden rainstorm.

episodes.title: Script Rewrites and Second Chances
episodes.synopsis: The top star and the reclusive writer clash over script changes while rumors swirl about their late-night meetings.

episodes.title: The Lonely and Great God
episodes.synopsis: An immortal goblin searches for his prophesied bride, the only one who can end his eternal life.

reviews.title: A beautiful 16-episode fantasy journey
reviews.comment: The world-building and slow-burn romance are fantastic. A few pacing issues in the middle, but the finale ties everything together in a really satisfying way.

reviews.title: A modern classic
reviews.comment: Rewatching years later and it still hits just as hard. The OST, the cinematography, the bittersweet story everything comes together perfectly.

reviews.title: Tense and addictive thriller
reviews.comment: Shadow Chaser keeps you guessing every episode. Strong performances and clever twists, with just enough character development to balance the suspense.

reviews.title: Solid mid-week suspense
reviews.comment: The Wednesday-night concept is fun and the cases are engaging. Some episodes are slower, but the overarching mystery is compelling enough to stick with.

reviews.title: Comforting campus rom-com
reviews.comment: Short episodes, lovable ensemble cast, and plenty of fluffy moments. Perfect background drama for the weekend, especially if you like friendship-focused stories.

dramas.title: Goblin: The Lonely and Great God
dramas.synopsis: An immortal goblin cursed with eternal life seeks his prophesied bride, the only one who can pull out the sword in his chest and end his suffering. Along the way, he shares a home with an amnesiac grim reaper and crosses paths with a high school girl who can see ghosts.

dramas.title: Crash Landing on You
dramas.synopsis: A South Korean chaebol heiress crash-lands in North Korea during a paragliding accident and is discovered by a stoic North Korean officer, who decides to hide her and help her find a way home.

dramas.title: Love in Bloom
dramas.synopsis: A perfectionist top student and a free-spirited musician become reluctant roommates in a cramped campus studio, discovering that their opposite lifestyles might be exactly what the other needs.

dramas.title: Campus Heartbeats
dramas.synopsis: A group of freshmen with clashing personalities navigate friendship, first love, and future dreams at a lively university campus.

dramas.title: City Lights 2022
dramas.synopsis: An overworked architect and a night-shift radio DJ cross paths on rain-soaked Seoul streets, forming a quiet connection that changes both of their lives.

dramas.title: Starlight Chronicles
dramas.synopsis: A struggling web novelist discovers a portal to a starlit realm where constellations take human form, forcing her to choose between two worlds and two fates.

dramas.title: Midweek Mystery 2024
dramas.synopsis: Every Wednesday night, a detective receives anonymous calls predicting crimes that have not yet occurred, dragging him into a conspiracy that blurs the line between reality and paranoia.

dramas.title: Shadow Chaser
dramas.synopsis: A criminal profiler returns to the force to hunt a killer whose crimes mirror an old unsolved case that still haunts her.

dramas.title: Wednesday Love
dramas.synopsis: In a city where everyone works late, a group of friends can only meet on Wednesday nights, and two of them slowly realize their weekly hangouts feel more like dates.

dramas.title: Midnight Romance in Namsan
dramas.synopsis: A top star hiding from a scandal and a reclusive screenwriter meet in a quiet Namsan neighborhood, rewriting both a drama script and their lives together.

dramas.title: Moonlight Whispers
dramas.synopsis: A late-night convenience store worker and a mysterious customer who only appears during lunar eclipses slowly piece together a shared past.

dramas.title: Heartstrings in Seoul
dramas.synopsis: A busker with stage fright and a tone-deaf office worker team up for a street music festival, discovering harmony in both music and love.

dramas.title: Kingdom of Shadows
dramas.synopsis: When a series of ritualistic murders mimics scenes from an old folktale, a detective and a folklore professor uncover a hidden kingdom of shadows encroaching on the real world.

dramas.title: Neon Nights
dramas.synopsis: In a neon-soaked district of Seoul, an undercover detective infiltrates an illegal street-racing ring linked to a powerful crime syndicate.

dramas.title: Starry Café
dramas.synopsis: A failing rooftop café becomes the unofficial meeting place for lonely office workers, thanks to its new owner who offers free stargazing sessions with every cup of coffee.

dramas.title: Hearts in Time
dramas.synopsis: A rookie prosecutor and a historian begin receiving letters from the past, forcing them to solve a century-old injustice while protecting their growing feelings.
